title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: main.py (第 1 至 180 行，共 194 行) ---
   1 | import argparse
   2 | import os
   3 | import sys
   4 | import asyncio
   5 | from pathlib import Path
   6 | from rich.console import Console
   7 | from rich.panel import Panel
   8 | from rich.markdown import Markdown
   9 | from rich.prompt import Prompt
  10 | from core.plan import PlanManager  # 🔥 改为导入类而非全局实例
  11 | 
  12 | # 1. 核心引擎导入
  13 | from core.engine import AgentEngine
  14 | 
  15 | # 2. 优化后的工具导入
  16 | from tools import get_default_tools
  17 | 
  18 | # Git 辅助函数导入
  19 | from tools.git_tool import has_uncommitted_changes, create_snapshot, get_git_status_dict
  20 | 
  21 | console = Console()
  22 | 
  23 | 
  24 | DEFAULT_BASE_URL = "https://api.openai.com/v1"
  25 | 
  26 | 
  27 | def load_env_file(env_path=None):
  28 |     """Load simple KEY=VALUE pairs from a .env file without overriding existing env vars."""
  29 |     path = Path(env_path or ".env")
  30 |     if not path.exists():
  31 |         return
  32 | 
  33 |     for raw_line in path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines():
  34 |         line = raw_line.strip()
  35 |         if not line or line.startswith("#") or "=" not in line:
  36 |             continue
  37 |         key, value = line.split("=", 1)
  38 |         key = key.strip()
  39 |         value = value.strip().strip('"').strip("'")
  40 |         if key and key not in os.environ:
  41 |             os.environ[key] = value
  42 | 
  43 | 
  44 | def get_agent_config():
  45 |     """Return API configuration from environment variables or local .env file."""
  46 |     load_env_file()
  47 |     api_key = os.getenv("MINI_CLAUDE_API_KEY") or os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
  48 |     base_url = os.getenv("MINI_CLAUDE_BASE_URL", DEFAULT_BASE_URL)
  49 | 
  50 |     if not api_key:
  51 |         raise RuntimeError(
  52 |             "未检测到 API Key。请设置环境变量 MINI_CLAUDE_API_KEY，"
  53 |             "或在项目根目录创建 .env 文件。可参考 .env.example。"
  54 |         )
  55 | 
  56 |     return {"api_key": api_key, "base_url": base_url}
  57 | 
  58 | 
  59 | def print_task_board(plan_manager):
  60 |     """简单的任务看板输出"""
  61 |     if not plan_manager.tasks:
  62 |         return
  63 | 
  64 |     console.print("\n" + "─" * 50)
  65 |     console.print("[bold cyan]📋 任务看板[/bold cyan]")
  66 |     console.print("─" * 50)
  67 | 
  68 |     for task in plan_manager.tasks:
  69 |         status_icon = "✅" if task["status"] == "done" else "⏳"
  70 | 
  71 |         status_color = "green" if task["status"] == "done" else "dim"
  72 | 
  73 |         console.print(f"  {status_icon} [{status_color}]{task['task']}[/{status_color}]")
  74 | 
  75 |     console.print("─" * 50 + "\n")
  76 | 
  77 | 
  78 | def print_banner():
  79 |     banner = """
  80 |     [bold cyan]Claude Code (Lite) - Python 研究版[/bold cyan]
  81 |     [dim]基于工程化代理架构 | 核心循环 [/dim]
  82 |     输入 [bold red]'exit'[/bold red] 退出，输入 [bold yellow]'/clear'[/bold yellow] 清空上下文
  83 |     """
  84 |     console.print(Panel(banner, border_style="cyan"))
  85 | 
  86 | 
  87 | #   main改为异步
  88 | async def main():
  89 |     # 命令行参数解析
  90 |     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Mini-Claude Agent 控制台")
  91 |     parser.add_argument("--session", type=str, default="default", help="指定会话 ID")
  92 |     parser.add_argument("--model", type=str, default="gpt-5.5", help="指定使用的模型")
  93 |     args = parser.parse_args()
  94 | 
  95 |     print(f"--- 🚀 正在启动会话: {args.session} ---")
  96 | 
  97 |     agent_config = get_agent_config()
  98 | 
  99 |     # 🔥 创建独立的 PlanManager 实例（每个 session 独立）
 100 |     plan_manager = PlanManager()
 101 | 
 102 |     # 3. 初始化工具集 (使用工厂函数)
 103 |     tools_list = get_default_tools(plan_manager=plan_manager)
 104 | 
 105 |     # 4. 初始化核心引擎
 106 |     engine = AgentEngine(
 107 |         tools=tools_list,
 108 |         model=args.model,
 109 |         plan_manager=plan_manager,
 110 |         session_id=args.session,
 111 |         base_url=agent_config["base_url"],
 112 ...
